name: Latitude MCP
title: Latitude MCP
description: Open-source AI agent monitoring platform. Full observability into what's failing in production. Discover underlying issues, get alerts when something breaks and verify your fix worked.
instructions: All Latitude MCP methods have descriptions and input/output schemas. For any doubt visit the Latitude documentation: https://docs.latitude.so/llms.txt

tools.name: createProject
tools.title: Create project
tools.description: Creates a new project within the organization. The name must be unique within the org.

name.description: Human-readable name for the project. Must be unique within the organization.
Human-readable name.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug form.

keepMonitoring.description: When `true`, the evaluation linked to an issue keeps running after the issue is resolved. When `false`, resolving the issue stops the evaluation. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

notifications.description: Per-group project-level notification toggles. Today only `incidents` exists; future groups (wrapped reports, etc.) slot in alongside.

issue.new.description: Send a notification when a new issue is discovered. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.regressed.description: Send a notification when a previously-resolved issue regresses. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.escalating.description: Send a notification when an active issue is escalating in volume or severity. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

escalation.description: Tuning parameters for the escalation detector. Affects detector behaviour regardless of whether notifications are enabled.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity of the escalation detector, 1 (most sensitive, more incidents) to 6 (least sensitive, fewer incidents). Defaults to a balanced value when omitted.

settings.description: Per-project settings overrides. `null` means inherit from the organization.

firstTraceAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the first ingested trace. `null` until the first trace lands.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the project was deleted. `null` while the project is active.

lastEditedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent name/settings edit.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata change.

tools.name: listProjects
tools.title: List projects
tools.description: Returns every project in the organization. The response uses the standard paginated shape; the project list currently fits in a single page (`nextCursor` is always `null`).

name.description: Human-readable name.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug form.

keepMonitoring.description: When `true`, the evaluation linked to an issue keeps running after the issue is resolved. When `false`, resolving the issue stops the evaluation. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

notifications.description: Per-group project-level notification toggles. Today only `incidents` exists; future groups (wrapped reports, etc.) slot in alongside.

issue.new.description: Send a notification when a new issue is discovered. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.regressed.description: Send a notification when a previously-resolved issue regresses. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.escalating.description: Send a notification when an active issue is escalating in volume or severity. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

escalation.description: Tuning parameters for the escalation detector. Affects detector behaviour regardless of whether notifications are enabled.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity of the escalation detector, 1 (most sensitive, more incidents) to 6 (least sensitive, fewer incidents). Defaults to a balanced value when omitted.

settings.description: Per-project settings overrides. `null` means inherit from the organization.

firstTraceAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the first ingested trace. `null` until the first trace lands.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the project was deleted. `null` while the project is active.

lastEditedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent name/settings edit.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata change.

items.description: Page of items, in the requested sort order.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. `null` when there are no more pages. Pass it back in `cursor` to continue.

hasMore.description: `true` when there is at least one more page after this one.

tools.title: Get project
tools.description: Returns a single project by slug.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug form.

keepMonitoring.description: When `true`, the evaluation linked to an issue keeps running after the issue is resolved. When `false`, resolving the issue stops the evaluation. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.regressed.description: Send a notification when a previously-resolved issue regresses. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.escalating.description: Send a notification when an active issue is escalating in volume or severity. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity of the escalation detector, 1 (most sensitive, more incidents) to 6 (least sensitive, fewer incidents). Defaults to a balanced value when omitted.

tools.name: updateProject
tools.title: Update project
tools.description: Updates a project's name and/or settings. Renaming may regenerate the slug — clients should re-read the response or rely on the `id` for stable references.

name.description: New human-readable name. Triggers slug regeneration when the change affects the slug form (cosmetic edits like capitalization keep the URL stable).

settings.description: Replace the project's settings overrides. Omit to leave settings untouched. To clear overrides entirely, edit via the web UI.

keepMonitoring.description: When `true`, the evaluation linked to an issue keeps running after the issue is resolved. When `false`, resolving the issue stops the evaluation. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

notifications.description: Per-group project-level notification toggles. Today only `incidents` exists; future groups (wrapped reports, etc.) slot in alongside.

issue.new.description: Send a notification when a new issue is discovered. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.regressed.description: Send a notification when a previously-resolved issue regresses. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

issue.escalating.description: Send a notification when an active issue is escalating in volume or severity. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

escalation.description: Tuning parameters for the escalation detector. Affects detector behaviour regardless of whether notifications are enabled.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity of the escalation detector, 1 (most sensitive, more incidents) to 6 (least sensitive, fewer incidents). Defaults to a balanced value when omitted.

flaggers.description: Enable or disable specific flaggers for the project. Keys are flagger slugs; values are the new `enabled` state. Omitted slugs are left untouched.

tools.name: deleteProject
tools.title: Delete project
tools.description: Deletes a project by slug.

tools.name: createScore
tools.title: Create project score
tools.description: Creates a score against a target trace. The trace is resolved by explicit id (`trace.by = "id"`) or by a filter set (`trace.by = "filters"`, exactly one match required). Annotations use the separate `/annotations` endpoint.

simulationId.description: Simulation this score is tied to, if any. `null` (default) when not part of a simulation.

value.description: Normalized score value in [0, 1]. Higher = better.

passed.description: Whether the scored output passes the evaluator's bar.

error.description: Generation error text, when score generation itself failed. `null` (default) for successful scores.

duration.description: Score generation duration in nanoseconds. `0` for externally-computed scores.

tokens.description: LLM tokens consumed generating the score, if any. `0` for externally-computed scores.

cost.description: Score cost in microcents (1/1,000,000 of a USD). `0` for externally-computed scores.

by.description: Match a single trace by its identifier. Pair with `id`.
Match a single trace by a filter set. Pair with `filters`; exactly one trace must match.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

trace.description: Target trace. Either an explicit id or a filter set matching exactly one trace.

sourceId.description: User-supplied tag identifying the score's origin (e.g. `"prod-pipeline"`, `"qa-script-v2"`).

metadata.description: Arbitrary user-supplied metadata persisted alongside the score.

_evaluation.description: Discriminator: omit (or `false`) for custom scores. Required `true` for evaluation scores.

simulationId.description: Simulation this score is tied to, if any. `null` (default) when not part of a simulation.

value.description: Normalized score value in [0, 1]. Higher = better.

passed.description: Whether the scored output passes the evaluator's bar.

error.description: Generation error text, when score generation itself failed. `null` (default) for successful scores.

duration.description: Score generation duration in nanoseconds. `0` for externally-computed scores.

tokens.description: LLM tokens consumed generating the score, if any. `0` for externally-computed scores.

cost.description: Score cost in microcents (1/1,000,000 of a USD). `0` for externally-computed scores.

by.description: Match a single trace by its identifier. Pair with `id`.
Match a single trace by a filter set. Pair with `filters`; exactly one trace must match.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

trace.description: Target trace. Either an explicit id or a filter set matching exactly one trace.

_evaluation.description: Discriminator: `true` flags the body as an evaluation score (internal); `false`/omit for custom.

sourceId.description: CUID of the evaluation that produced this score.

evaluationHash.description: Hash of the evaluation script that produced this score; lets the platform track which version generated it.

tools.name: createAnnotation
tools.title: Create project annotation
tools.description: Creates a published annotation score against a target trace. The trace is resolved by explicit id (`trace.by = "id"`) or by a filter set (`trace.by = "filters"`, exactly one match required). When called with an OAuth token, the annotation is attributed to the authenticated user.

simulationId.description: Simulation this annotation is tied to, if any. `null` (default) when not part of a simulation.

issueId.description: Pre-selected issue this annotation belongs to. Leave `null` (default) to let the automatic issue-discovery pipeline route the annotation.

value.description: Normalized score value in [0, 1]. Higher = better.

passed.description: Whether the annotated output passes the reviewer's bar.

feedback.description: Free-text feedback explaining the score. Surfaced alongside the trace.

anchor.description: Optional anchor pinning the annotation to a specific message / part / offset range inside the trace.

messageIndex.description: 0-based message index inside the conversation. Omit for conversation-level annotations.

partIndex.description: 0-based index into the target message's `parts[]`. Requires `messageIndex`.

startOffset.description: Inclusive start offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `endOffset` and `partIndex`.

endOffset.description: Exclusive end offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `startOffset` and `partIndex`, and `>= startOffset`.

textFormat.description: UI-side text transform applied before the offsets were captured (e.g. `"pretty-json"`). Resolvers must apply the same transform before slicing.

by.description: Match a single trace by its identifier. Pair with `id`.
Match a single trace by a filter set. Pair with `filters`; exactly one trace must match.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

trace.description: Target trace. Either an explicit id or a filter set matching exactly one trace.

anyOf.description: Session identifier lifted from instrumentation. Up to 128 characters.

sessionId.description: Session id lifted from the annotated trace. `null` when the trace has no session.

spanId.description: Span the annotation pins to. Defaults to the trace's last LLM-completion span.

issueId.description: Issue this annotation contributes to, if any.

value.description: Normalized score value in [0, 1]. Higher = better.

passed.description: Whether the annotation marks the output as passing.

error.description: Generation error text, when the annotation itself errored. `null` for successful annotations.

errored.description: `true` when the annotation could not be generated successfully.

duration.description: Generation duration in nanoseconds. `0` for human annotations.

tokens.description: Total LLM tokens consumed generating the score. `0` for human annotations.

cost.description: Total LLM cost in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD). `0` for human annotations.

draftedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the annotation was drafted. `null` for published annotations.

annotatorId.description: User who authored the annotation. `null` when not attributed to a user.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the annotation was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

sourceId.description: Origin marker. Sentinel `"UI"` / `"API"` / `"SYSTEM"` for drafts and automation, or an annotation-queue CUID for queue-authored rows.

rawFeedback.description: Original feedback text as written by the annotator, before any server-side enrichment.

messageIndex.description: 0-based message index inside the conversation. Omit for conversation-level annotations.

partIndex.description: 0-based index into the target message's `parts[]`. Requires `messageIndex`.

startOffset.description: Inclusive start offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `endOffset` and `partIndex`.

endOffset.description: Exclusive end offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `startOffset` and `partIndex`, and `>= startOffset`.

textFormat.description: UI-side text transform applied before the offsets were captured (e.g. `"pretty-json"`). Resolvers must apply the same transform before slicing.

metadata.description: Annotation-specific metadata: `rawFeedback` plus a snapshot of the anchor at write time.

tools.name: listTraces
tools.title: List project traces
tools.description: Returns a cursor-paginated page of traces in the project. Combine `filters` with `query` (free-text semantic search) to narrow the result set. Trace list rows exclude per-message LLM content — use `getTrace` for the full conversation view.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned in a previous response's `nextCursor`. Omit on the first page.

sortBy.description: Field to sort by. Defaults to `startTime`.

sortDirection.description: Sort direction. Defaults to `desc` (most recent first).

query.description: Free-text semantic search across the trace's input and output messages. Combined with `filters` via AND.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

spanCount.description: Total number of spans in the trace.

errorCount.description: Number of spans flagged with an error status.

startTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the trace's earliest span.

endTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the trace's latest span.

durationNs.description: Wall-clock duration of the trace in nanoseconds.

timeToFirstTokenNs.description: Nanoseconds from the start of the first LLM span to its first emitted token. `0` if not measured.

tokensInput.description: Total input tokens across LLM spans.

tokensOutput.description: Total output tokens across LLM spans.

tokensCacheRead.description: Total tokens served from the provider's prompt cache.

tokensCacheCreate.description: Total tokens written to the provider's prompt cache.

tokensReasoning.description: Total reasoning tokens reported by the model.

costInputMicrocents.description: Cost of input tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costOutputMicrocents.description: Cost of output tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

sessionId.description: Conversation/session identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

userId.description: End-user identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

simulationId.description: CUID of the simulation that produced this trace. `null` when not a simulation.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached at ingest time.

models.description: Model identifiers seen across the trace's LLM spans.

providers.description: LLM-provider identifiers seen across the trace's spans.

serviceNames.description: OpenTelemetry `service.name` values seen in the trace.

rootSpanId.description: Identifier of the trace's root span. `null` when no root span has been ingested.

rootSpanName.description: `name` attribute of the root span. `null` when no root span has been ingested.

items.description: Page of items, in the requested sort order.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. `null` when there are no more pages. Pass it back in `cursor` to continue.

hasMore.description: `true` when there is at least one more page after this one.

tools.name: getTrace
tools.title: Get project trace
tools.description: Returns a single trace by id, including the captured system instructions and the conversation messages from the trace's last LLM-completion span.

spanCount.description: Total number of spans in the trace.

errorCount.description: Number of spans flagged with an error status.

startTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the trace's earliest span.

endTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the trace's latest span.

durationNs.description: Wall-clock duration of the trace in nanoseconds.

timeToFirstTokenNs.description: Nanoseconds from the start of the first LLM span to its first emitted token. `0` if not measured.

tokensInput.description: Total input tokens across LLM spans.

tokensOutput.description: Total output tokens across LLM spans.

tokensCacheRead.description: Total tokens served from the provider's prompt cache.

tokensCacheCreate.description: Total tokens written to the provider's prompt cache.

tokensReasoning.description: Total reasoning tokens reported by the model.

costInputMicrocents.description: Cost of input tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costOutputMicrocents.description: Cost of output tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

sessionId.description: Conversation/session identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

userId.description: End-user identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

simulationId.description: CUID of the simulation that produced this trace. `null` when not a simulation.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached at ingest time.

models.description: Model identifiers seen across the trace's LLM spans.

providers.description: LLM-provider identifiers seen across the trace's spans.

serviceNames.description: OpenTelemetry `service.name` values seen in the trace.

rootSpanId.description: Identifier of the trace's root span. `null` when no root span has been ingested.

rootSpanName.description: `name` attribute of the root span. `null` when no root span has been ingested.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata attached at ingest time.

systemInstructions.description: System instructions in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

items.description: Message in OpenTelemetry GenAI format (`role` + content parts + optional tool calls).

inputMessages.description: Input messages sent into the first LLM span of the trace, in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

items.description: Message in OpenTelemetry GenAI format (`role` + content parts + optional tool calls).

outputMessages.description: Output messages from the last LLM span of the trace, in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

items.description: Message in OpenTelemetry GenAI format (`role` + content parts + optional tool calls).

allMessages.description: Full conversation view for the trace's final turn — the last span's input messages followed by its output messages, in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

tools.name: listTraceSpans
tools.title: List trace spans
tools.description: Returns every span belonging to the trace, ordered by `startTime` ascending. Spans carry the OpenTelemetry envelope (kind, status, attributes, resource) plus Latitude's GenAI enrichment (tokens, cost, operation, provider, model). Per-message LLM content is excluded for size; use a span point-lookup for the conversation payload.

traceId.description: Identifier of the trace this span belongs to.

spanId.description: Stable span identifier within the trace.

parentSpanId.description: Identifier of the parent span. `null` for root spans.

sessionId.description: Conversation/session identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

userId.description: End-user identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

simulationId.description: CUID of the simulation that produced this span. `null` when not a simulation.

apiKeyId.description: Latitude API key used to ingest the span. `null` when ingested without an API key.

startTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the span started.

endTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the span ended.

name.description: Span name (e.g. the entry-point function or route).

statusMessage.description: OpenTelemetry status message. Empty when not set.

traceState.description: OpenTelemetry trace state (vendor-specific propagation). Empty when not set.

errorType.description: Error class/type label when the span errored. `null` for successful spans.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached at ingest time.

operation.description: GenAI operation category (e.g. `"chat"`, `"embeddings"`, `"execute_tool"`, `"invoke_agent"`) or a custom string for non-GenAI spans.

provider.description: LLM provider id. `null` for non-LLM spans.

model.description: Model id as requested. `null` for non-LLM spans.

responseModel.description: Model id reported by the provider's response. `null` for non-LLM spans.

tokensInput.description: Input tokens consumed by this span.

tokensOutput.description: Output tokens produced by this span.

tokensCacheRead.description: Tokens served from the provider's prompt cache.

tokensCacheCreate.description: Tokens written to the provider's prompt cache.

tokensReasoning.description: Reasoning tokens reported by the model.

costInputMicrocents.description: Cost of input tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costOutputMicrocents.description: Cost of output tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costIsEstimated.description: `true` when the cost was derived from public pricing tables instead of the provider's bill.

timeToFirstTokenNs.description: Nanoseconds from the start of the span to its first emitted token. `0` if not measured.

isStreaming.description: `true` when the span was produced by a streaming LLM call.

responseId.description: Response identifier returned by the LLM. `null` when the provider didn't return one.

finishReasons.description: Per-choice finish reasons reported by the LLM provider.

scopeName.description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation scope name. Empty when not set.

scopeVersion.description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation scope version. Empty when not set.

retentionDays.description: Per-span retention override in days. Omitted when the project default applies.

ingestedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which Latitude received this span.

items.description: All spans belonging to the trace, ordered by `startTime` ascending.

tools.name: getTraceSpan
tools.title: Get trace span
tools.description: Returns one span by id, including the LLM conversation (system instructions, input messages, output messages), tool data (definitions, call id, input, output), and the full OpenTelemetry payload (attributes, resource, events, links) that's excluded from the lighter list shape.

traceId.description: Identifier of the trace this span belongs to.

spanId.description: Stable span identifier within the trace.

parentSpanId.description: Identifier of the parent span. `null` for root spans.

sessionId.description: Conversation/session identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

userId.description: End-user identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

simulationId.description: CUID of the simulation that produced this span. `null` when not a simulation.

apiKeyId.description: Latitude API key used to ingest the span. `null` when ingested without an API key.

startTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the span started.

endTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the span ended.

name.description: Span name (e.g. the entry-point function or route).

statusMessage.description: OpenTelemetry status message. Empty when not set.

traceState.description: OpenTelemetry trace state (vendor-specific propagation). Empty when not set.

errorType.description: Error class/type label when the span errored. `null` for successful spans.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached at ingest time.

operation.description: GenAI operation category (e.g. `"chat"`, `"embeddings"`, `"execute_tool"`, `"invoke_agent"`) or a custom string for non-GenAI spans.

provider.description: LLM provider id. `null` for non-LLM spans.

model.description: Model id as requested. `null` for non-LLM spans.

responseModel.description: Model id reported by the provider's response. `null` for non-LLM spans.

tokensInput.description: Input tokens consumed by this span.

tokensOutput.description: Output tokens produced by this span.

tokensCacheRead.description: Tokens served from the provider's prompt cache.

tokensCacheCreate.description: Tokens written to the provider's prompt cache.

tokensReasoning.description: Reasoning tokens reported by the model.

costInputMicrocents.description: Cost of input tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costOutputMicrocents.description: Cost of output tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costIsEstimated.description: `true` when the cost was derived from public pricing tables instead of the provider's bill.

timeToFirstTokenNs.description: Nanoseconds from the start of the span to its first emitted token. `0` if not measured.

isStreaming.description: `true` when the span was produced by a streaming LLM call.

responseId.description: Response identifier returned by the LLM. `null` when the provider didn't return one.

finishReasons.description: Per-choice finish reasons reported by the LLM provider.

scopeName.description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation scope name. Empty when not set.

scopeVersion.description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation scope version. Empty when not set.

retentionDays.description: Per-span retention override in days. Omitted when the project default applies.

ingestedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which Latitude received this span.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata attached at ingest time.

systemInstructions.description: System instructions in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

items.description: Message in OpenTelemetry GenAI format (`role` + content parts + optional tool calls).

inputMessages.description: Input messages sent into this LLM span, in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

items.description: Message in OpenTelemetry GenAI format (`role` + content parts + optional tool calls).

outputMessages.description: Output messages returned by this LLM span, in OpenTelemetry GenAI format.

name.description: Tool name as exposed to the LLM.

description.description: Tool description as exposed to the LLM.

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the tool's parameters, as provided by the caller.

toolDefinitions.description: Tool/function definitions made available to the LLM for this span.

toolCallId.description: Tool-call id this span answers. Empty when the span isn't an `execute_tool` span.

toolName.description: Name of the executed tool. Empty when the span isn't an `execute_tool` span.

toolInput.description: Stringified arguments passed to the tool. Empty when the span isn't an `execute_tool` span.

toolOutput.description: Stringified tool output. Empty when the span isn't an `execute_tool` span.

resourceString.description: OpenTelemetry resource attributes captured at ingest.

eventsJson.description: JSON-encoded OpenTelemetry events array. Empty when the span has no events.

linksJson.description: JSON-encoded OpenTelemetry span-links array. Empty when the span has no links.

tools.name: listTraceAnnotations
tools.title: List trace annotations
tools.description: Returns a cursor-paginated page of annotations pinned to the trace, including both published annotations and drafts.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned in a previous response's `nextCursor`. Omit on the first page.

anyOf.description: Session identifier lifted from instrumentation. Up to 128 characters.

sessionId.description: Session id lifted from the annotated trace. `null` when the trace has no session.

spanId.description: Span the annotation pins to. Defaults to the trace's last LLM-completion span.

issueId.description: Issue this annotation contributes to, if any.

value.description: Normalized score value in [0, 1]. Higher = better.

passed.description: Whether the annotation marks the output as passing.

error.description: Generation error text, when the annotation itself errored. `null` for successful annotations.

errored.description: `true` when the annotation could not be generated successfully.

duration.description: Generation duration in nanoseconds. `0` for human annotations.

tokens.description: Total LLM tokens consumed generating the score. `0` for human annotations.

cost.description: Total LLM cost in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD). `0` for human annotations.

draftedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the annotation was drafted. `null` for published annotations.

annotatorId.description: User who authored the annotation. `null` when not attributed to a user.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the annotation was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

sourceId.description: Origin marker. Sentinel `"UI"` / `"API"` / `"SYSTEM"` for drafts and automation, or an annotation-queue CUID for queue-authored rows.

rawFeedback.description: Original feedback text as written by the annotator, before any server-side enrichment.

messageIndex.description: 0-based message index inside the conversation. Omit for conversation-level annotations.

partIndex.description: 0-based index into the target message's `parts[]`. Requires `messageIndex`.

startOffset.description: Inclusive start offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `endOffset` and `partIndex`.

endOffset.description: Exclusive end offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `startOffset` and `partIndex`, and `>= startOffset`.

textFormat.description: UI-side text transform applied before the offsets were captured (e.g. `"pretty-json"`). Resolvers must apply the same transform before slicing.

metadata.description: Annotation-specific metadata: `rawFeedback` plus a snapshot of the anchor at write time.

items.description: Page of items, in the requested sort order.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. `null` when there are no more pages. Pass it back in `cursor` to continue.

hasMore.description: `true` when there is at least one more page after this one.

tools.name: getTraceAnnotation
tools.title: Get trace annotation
tools.description: Returns one annotation by id pinned to the trace.

anyOf.description: Session identifier lifted from instrumentation. Up to 128 characters.

sessionId.description: Session id lifted from the annotated trace. `null` when the trace has no session.

spanId.description: Span the annotation pins to. Defaults to the trace's last LLM-completion span.

issueId.description: Issue this annotation contributes to, if any.

value.description: Normalized score value in [0, 1]. Higher = better.

passed.description: Whether the annotation marks the output as passing.

error.description: Generation error text, when the annotation itself errored. `null` for successful annotations.

errored.description: `true` when the annotation could not be generated successfully.

duration.description: Generation duration in nanoseconds. `0` for human annotations.

tokens.description: Total LLM tokens consumed generating the score. `0` for human annotations.

cost.description: Total LLM cost in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD). `0` for human annotations.

draftedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the annotation was drafted. `null` for published annotations.

annotatorId.description: User who authored the annotation. `null` when not attributed to a user.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the annotation was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

sourceId.description: Origin marker. Sentinel `"UI"` / `"API"` / `"SYSTEM"` for drafts and automation, or an annotation-queue CUID for queue-authored rows.

rawFeedback.description: Original feedback text as written by the annotator, before any server-side enrichment.

messageIndex.description: 0-based message index inside the conversation. Omit for conversation-level annotations.

partIndex.description: 0-based index into the target message's `parts[]`. Requires `messageIndex`.

startOffset.description: Inclusive start offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `endOffset` and `partIndex`.

endOffset.description: Exclusive end offset for substring annotations. Must be paired with `startOffset` and `partIndex`, and `>= startOffset`.

textFormat.description: UI-side text transform applied before the offsets were captured (e.g. `"pretty-json"`). Resolvers must apply the same transform before slicing.

metadata.description: Annotation-specific metadata: `rawFeedback` plus a snapshot of the anchor at write time.

tools.name: exportTraces
tools.title: Export project traces (async)
tools.description: Enqueues a CSV export of the traces matched by `traces`. The export runs asynchronously; a download link is emailed to `recipient` when the file is ready. The response returns immediately with `status = "queued"`. The recipient must already be a member of the requesting organization.

by.description: Match an explicit list of traces by their identifiers. Pair with `ids`.
Match every trace produced by a filter set. Pair with `filters`; result count is not bounded.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

traces.description: Which traces to include in the export — either explicit ids or a filter set.

recipient.description: Email address the export download link is sent to. Must belong to a member of the requesting organization — otherwise the request is rejected with 400.

status.description: Always `"queued"`. The CSV is built asynchronously and emailed to `recipient` when ready.

tools.name: listSavedSearches
tools.title: List saved searches
tools.description: Returns every saved search in the project. The response uses the standard paginated shape; the saved-search list currently fits in a single page (`nextCursor` is always `null`).

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this saved search.

projectId.description: Project this saved search belongs to.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug.

name.description: Human-readable name.

query.description: Free-text semantic query applied alongside `filters`. `null` when the search is filter-only. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

filters.description: Structured filter set applied alongside `query`. Empty object means filter-free. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

assignedUserId.description: User this search is assigned to, if any. `null` when the search is unassigned.

createdByUserId.description: User who created the saved search.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the search was deleted. `null` while active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

items.description: Page of items, in the requested sort order.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. `null` when there are no more pages. Pass it back in `cursor` to continue.

hasMore.description: `true` when there is at least one more page after this one.

tools.name: getSavedSearch
tools.title: Get saved search
tools.description: Returns a single saved search by slug.

searchSlug.description: Saved-search slug (human-readable identifier within the project).

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this saved search.

projectId.description: Project this saved search belongs to.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug.

name.description: Human-readable name.

query.description: Free-text semantic query applied alongside `filters`. `null` when the search is filter-only. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

filters.description: Structured filter set applied alongside `query`. Empty object means filter-free. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

assignedUserId.description: User this search is assigned to, if any. `null` when the search is unassigned.

createdByUserId.description: User who created the saved search.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the search was deleted. `null` while active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

tools.name: createSavedSearch
tools.title: Create saved search
tools.description: Creates a saved search within the project. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set. The slug is derived from `name`. OAuth-authenticated only — the authenticated user becomes the search's `createdByUserId`.

name.description: Human-readable name. Used to derive the slug.

query.description: Free-text semantic query. `null` (default) when the search is filter-only. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

filters.description: Structured filter set. Defaults to `{}` (no filters). At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

assignedUserId.description: User to assign the search to. `null` (default) leaves the search unassigned.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this saved search.

projectId.description: Project this saved search belongs to.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug.

name.description: Human-readable name.

query.description: Free-text semantic query applied alongside `filters`. `null` when the search is filter-only. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

filters.description: Structured filter set applied alongside `query`. Empty object means filter-free. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

assignedUserId.description: User this search is assigned to, if any. `null` when the search is unassigned.

createdByUserId.description: User who created the saved search.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the search was deleted. `null` while active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

tools.name: updateSavedSearch
tools.title: Update saved search
tools.description: Updates a saved search. Renaming may regenerate the slug — clients should re-read the response or rely on the `id` for stable references.

searchSlug.description: Saved-search slug (human-readable identifier within the project).

name.description: New human-readable name. Triggers slug regeneration when the change affects the slug form (cosmetic edits like capitalization keep the URL stable).

query.description: Replace the free-text query. Pass `null` to clear it.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

assignedUserId.description: Replace the assignee. Pass `null` to clear it. Use the dedicated `/assign` endpoint to validate membership.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this saved search.

projectId.description: Project this saved search belongs to.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug.

name.description: Human-readable name.

query.description: Free-text semantic query applied alongside `filters`. `null` when the search is filter-only. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

filters.description: Structured filter set applied alongside `query`. Empty object means filter-free. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

assignedUserId.description: User this search is assigned to, if any. `null` when the search is unassigned.

createdByUserId.description: User who created the saved search.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the search was deleted. `null` while active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

tools.name: deleteSavedSearch
tools.title: Delete saved search
tools.description: Deletes a saved search by slug.

searchSlug.description: Saved-search slug (human-readable identifier within the project).

tools.name: assignSavedSearch
tools.title: Assign saved search
tools.description: Assigns the saved search to a user, or clears the current assignment when `userId` is `null`. The assignee must be a member of the requesting organization — otherwise the request is rejected with 400.

searchSlug.description: Saved-search slug (human-readable identifier within the project).

userId.description: User to assign the search to, or `null` to clear the current assignment.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this saved search.

projectId.description: Project this saved search belongs to.

slug.description: URL-safe slug derived from `name`. Regenerated when the name changes in a way that affects the slug.

name.description: Human-readable name.

query.description: Free-text semantic query applied alongside `filters`. `null` when the search is filter-only. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

op.description: Comparison operator applied to the field's value (e.g. `eq`, `neq`, `in`). The full operator list lives in the API reference.

value.description: Right-hand value compared against the field. Arrays are required for `in` / `notIn`-style operators.

filters.description: Structured filter set applied alongside `query`. Empty object means filter-free. At least one of `query` or `filters` must be set.

assignedUserId.description: User this search is assigned to, if any. `null` when the search is unassigned.

createdByUserId.description: User who created the saved search.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the search was deleted. `null` while active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

tools.name: listSavedSearchTraces
tools.title: List traces matching a saved search
tools.description: Returns a cursor-paginated page of traces that match the saved search's `query` + `filters`. Each row uses the same `Trace` shape as `listTraces` — use the trace point-lookup endpoints (`getTrace`, `listTraceSpans`, `getTraceSpan`, `listTraceAnnotations`) to drill into individual traces.

searchSlug.description: Saved-search slug (human-readable identifier within the project).

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned in a previous response's `nextCursor`. Omit on the first page.

sortBy.description: Field to sort by. Defaults to `startTime`.

sortDirection.description: Sort direction. Defaults to `desc` (most recent first).

spanCount.description: Total number of spans in the trace.

errorCount.description: Number of spans flagged with an error status.

startTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the trace's earliest span.

endTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the trace's latest span.

durationNs.description: Wall-clock duration of the trace in nanoseconds.

timeToFirstTokenNs.description: Nanoseconds from the start of the first LLM span to its first emitted token. `0` if not measured.

tokensInput.description: Total input tokens across LLM spans.

tokensOutput.description: Total output tokens across LLM spans.

tokensCacheRead.description: Total tokens served from the provider's prompt cache.

tokensCacheCreate.description: Total tokens written to the provider's prompt cache.

tokensReasoning.description: Total reasoning tokens reported by the model.

costInputMicrocents.description: Cost of input tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

costOutputMicrocents.description: Cost of output tokens in microcents (1/1,000,000 USD).

sessionId.description: Conversation/session identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

userId.description: End-user identifier set by the SDK. `null` when absent.

simulationId.description: CUID of the simulation that produced this trace. `null` when not a simulation.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached at ingest time.

models.description: Model identifiers seen across the trace's LLM spans.

providers.description: LLM-provider identifiers seen across the trace's spans.

serviceNames.description: OpenTelemetry `service.name` values seen in the trace.

rootSpanId.description: Identifier of the trace's root span. `null` when no root span has been ingested.

rootSpanName.description: `name` attribute of the root span. `null` when no root span has been ingested.

items.description: Page of items, in the requested sort order.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. `null` when there are no more pages. Pass it back in `cursor` to continue.

hasMore.description: `true` when there is at least one more page after this one.

tools.name: createApiKey
tools.title: Generate API key
tools.description: Generates a new API key for the organization. The token is only returned once — store it securely.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key. Used to distinguish keys in the UI.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this API key.

name.description: Human-readable name.

token.description: The full API key token. Returned by create / get / update — store it securely; treat it as a password.

lastUsedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent successful authentication. `null` until first use.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the key was revoked. `null` while the key is active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update (rename, revoke, last-used touch).

tools.name: listApiKeys
tools.title: List API keys
tools.description: Returns all API keys for the organization. Tokens are not included in the list response.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this API key.

name.description: Human-readable name.

token.description: Masked token preview safe to display in lists. Use `GET /api-keys/{id}` to retrieve the full token.

lastUsedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent successful authentication. `null` until first use.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the key was revoked. `null` while the key is active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

tools.name: getApiKey
tools.title: Get API key
tools.description: Returns a single API key including the full unmasked `token`. Useful for retrieving a stored token by id without rotating it.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this API key.

name.description: Human-readable name.

token.description: The full API key token. Returned by create / get / update — store it securely; treat it as a password.

lastUsedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent successful authentication. `null` until first use.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the key was revoked. `null` while the key is active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update (rename, revoke, last-used touch).

tools.name: updateApiKey
tools.title: Update API key
tools.description: Renames an API key. The token itself is immutable — use create + revoke if you need a new value.

name.description: New human-readable name for the API key.

organizationId.description: Organization that owns this API key.

name.description: Human-readable name.

token.description: The full API key token. Returned by create / get / update — store it securely; treat it as a password.

lastUsedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent successful authentication. `null` until first use.

deletedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the key was revoked. `null` while the key is active.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last metadata update (rename, revoke, last-used touch).

tools.name: revokeApiKey
tools.title: Revoke API key
tools.description: Revokes an API key.

tools.name: listOAuthKeys
tools.title: List OAuth keys
tools.description: Returns every OAuth key (like MCP clients) connected to the organization.

clientId.description: Identifier of the OAuth client the key was issued to.

clientName.description: Display name of the OAuth client.

clientIcon.description: Icon URL of the OAuth client.

userId.description: Identifier of the user the key belongs to.

userName.description: Display name of the user. `null` until the user completes onboarding.

lastActivityAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last refresh on the key. `null` if the key has never been used.

connectedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the key was connected.

disabled.description: Whether the key has been disabled.

tools.name: getOAuthKey
tools.title: Get OAuth key
tools.description: Returns a single OAuth key (like MCP clients) by id.

clientId.description: Identifier of the OAuth client the key was issued to.

clientName.description: Display name of the OAuth client.

clientIcon.description: Icon URL of the OAuth client.

userId.description: Identifier of the user the key belongs to.

userName.description: Display name of the user. `null` until the user completes onboarding.

lastActivityAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last refresh on the key. `null` if the key has never been used.

connectedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the key was connected.

disabled.description: Whether the key has been disabled.

tools.name: revokeOAuthKey
tools.title: Revoke OAuth key
tools.description: Revokes an OAuth key (like MCP clients). The connected client immediately loses access.

tools.name: getAccount
tools.title: Get account
tools.description: Returns the caller's account snapshot: the organization the request is scoped to, plus the user record and their role when the request was made by a real user (OAuth). API-key callers receive `user: null` and `role: null` because API keys aren't tied to a specific user.

id.description: Stable user identifier across the API.

email.description: Verified email address of the authenticated user.

name.description: Display name, when set. `null` until the user completes onboarding.

user.description: The user the request is acting on behalf of. `null` for API-key callers — API keys are org-scoped, not user-scoped.

id.description: Stable organization identifier across the API.

name.description: Human-readable organization name.

slug.description: URL-safe slug. Regenerated when the organization is renamed — don't use it as a stable key.

organization.description: Organization the request is scoped to.

anyOf.description: Caller's role in the organization. `null` for API-key callers (no real user behind the credential).

tools.name: listMembers
tools.title: List members
tools.description: Returns every active member of the caller's organization with their role and user details.

status.description: Discriminator for confirmed members — the user has accepted their invitation and joined the org.

id.description: Stable membership identifier. Use this to address the row in update/remove endpoints.

userId.description: Identifier of the user the membership represents.

name.description: Display name of the user. `null` if the user hasn't completed onboarding.

email.description: User's email address, verified at signup.

image.description: User's profile image URL, when set.

joinedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the user joined the organization.

status.description: Discriminator for pending invitations — the invitee hasn't accepted yet, so no user record exists.

id.description: Stable invitation identifier. Distinct from membership ids.

organizationId.description: Organization the invitation grants access to.

userId.description: Always `null` — no user record exists until the invitation is accepted.

role.description: Role the invitee will get once they accept. `null` means the default (`member`).

name.description: Always `null` — no user record exists yet.

email.description: Email address the invitation was sent to.

image.description: Always `null` — no user record exists yet.

invitedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the invitation was created.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the invitation expires.

inviterId.description: User id of the member who issued the invitation.

tools.name: inviteMember
tools.title: Invite a member
tools.description: Issues an invitation to join the caller's organization. The invitee receives an accept link by email and becomes a member once they accept. The response is the pending invitation record. Requires OAuth authentication (API-key callers can't act on behalf of a specific user).

email.description: Email address to invite. The invitee receives an accept link by email.

role.description: Role to grant on acceptance. Defaults to `member` when omitted.

status.description: Discriminator for pending invitations — the invitee hasn't accepted yet, so no user record exists.

id.description: Stable invitation identifier. Distinct from membership ids.

organizationId.description: Organization the invitation grants access to.

userId.description: Always `null` — no user record exists until the invitation is accepted.

role.description: Role the invitee will get once they accept. `null` means the default (`member`).

name.description: Always `null` — no user record exists yet.

email.description: Email address the invitation was sent to.

image.description: Always `null` — no user record exists yet.

invitedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the invitation was created.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the invitation expires.

inviterId.description: User id of the member who issued the invitation.

tools.name: getMember
tools.title: Get member
tools.description: Returns a single member of the caller's organization, including their role and user details.

status.description: Discriminator for confirmed members — the user has accepted their invitation and joined the org.

id.description: Stable membership identifier. Use this to address the row in update/remove endpoints.

userId.description: Identifier of the user the membership represents.

name.description: Display name of the user. `null` if the user hasn't completed onboarding.

email.description: User's email address, verified at signup.

image.description: User's profile image URL, when set.

joinedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the user joined the organization.

tools.name: updateMember
tools.title: Update a member
tools.description: Updates a member of the caller's organization. Today only the role is mutable. The caller must be an admin or owner; owners cannot be demoted via this endpoint. Requires OAuth authentication.

role.description: New role. Owners cannot be changed via this endpoint — owner-transfer happens on the web.

status.description: Discriminator for confirmed members — the user has accepted their invitation and joined the org.

id.description: Stable membership identifier. Use this to address the row in update/remove endpoints.

userId.description: Identifier of the user the membership represents.

name.description: Display name of the user. `null` if the user hasn't completed onboarding.

email.description: User's email address, verified at signup.

image.description: User's profile image URL, when set.

joinedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the user joined the organization.

tools.name: removeMember
tools.title: Remove a member
tools.description: Removes a member from the caller's organization. Self-removal and removing the organization owner are rejected — transfer ownership first. Requires OAuth authentication.
